name: Homemade Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 Potatoes; pared, cut into bite size pieces
2 Leeks; washed, pared, cut into bite size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients except milk and chives in the crockpot.
2. Cook on low for 10-12 hours or high for 3-4 hours.
3. Stir in milk during the last hour of cooking.
4. Serve topped with chopped chives.
